biological_replicate: BMDMs from B6 mice were primed with LPS
technical_replicate: The cell lysates were immunoprecipitated with antibody to NLRP3 and blotted with antibodies to phospho-tyrosine
experimental_design: To determine whether Lyn is indeed a negative regulator of the NLRP3 inflammasome, we generated Lyn–/– mice on a C57BL/6 background
factor_value: We generated BMDMs from Lyn–/– mice and B6 BMDMs
number_of_fractions: The soluble and insoluble proteins were extracted
number_of_biological_replicates: The text does not specify the exact number of biological replicates, but it implies at least 2 groups (B6 and Lyn–/–)
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (B6 and Lyn–/–) and 2 fractions (soluble and insoluble)
